name.description: The name of the resume's subject.

label.description: The subject's professional title, e.g. Web Developer.

image.description: URL (as per RFC 3986) to an image in JPEG or PNG format.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the subject. Phone numbers are stored as strings so use any format preferred, e.g.'712-117-2923'.

summary.description: A short 2-3 sentence biography about the subject.

location.description: Where the subject is from. Can be a general region or their exact home address.

links.description: A list of web links relevant to the subject, e.g. personal website, social media, portfolios, etc.

label.description: The label for the hyperlink, e.g. '@johndoe'.

work.description: A list of past and present professional work done, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

employer.description: The name of the company, e.g. 'Facebook'.

location.description: The location the job is/was, e.g. 'Menlo Park, CA'. If the job is/was remote, specify 'Remote'.

^description$.description: A short, 1 sentence maximum description of the company, e.g. 'Social Media Company'.

position.description: The title of the role, e.g. 'Software Engineer'.

url.description: The relevant URL of the company's homepage, e.g. 'https://facebook.example.com'.

startDate.description: The date on which this position was started.

endDate.description: The date on which this position was stopped. If current and ongoing, specify a blank string as the value for this key.

summary.description: An overview of the responsibilities at the company. No more than 3-5 sentences.

highlights.description: A list of the key highlights of the volunteer role. For best results, use the XYZ formula with quantifiable attributes.

items.description: e.g. Increased profits by 20% from 2011-2012 through viral advertising.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this job position.

volunteer.description: A list of past and present volunteer work done, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

organization.description: The name of the volunteer organization, e.g. 'American Red Cross'.

position.description: The title of the volunteer role, e.g. 'Customer Service Representative'.

url.description: The relevant URL of the volunteer organization's homepage, e.g. 'https://redcross.example.com'.

startDate.description: The date on which this volunteer position was started.

endDate.description: The date on which this volunteer position was stopped. If current and ongoing, specify a blank string as the value for this key.

summary.description: An overview of the responsibilities at the volunteer organization. No more than 3-5 sentences.

highlights.description: A list of the key highlights of the volunteer role. For best results, use the XYZ formula with quantifiable attributes.

items.description: e.g. Increased profits by 20% from 2011-2012 through viral advertising.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this volunteer position.

education.description: A list of past and present institutions attended, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

institution.description: The name of the institution being attended, e.g. 'Massachusetts Institute of Technology'.

subInstitution.description: A specific college/school/department within the institution, e.g. 'College of Arts and Humanities'.

url.description: The relevant URL of the institution's homepage, e.g. 'https://example.com.edu'.

subInstitutionUrl.description: The relevant URL of the sub-institution's homepage, if different, e.g. 'https://example.com.edu/arts-humanities'.

location.description: The location of the institution, e.g. 'Boston, MA'.

area.description: The broad area of study, e.g. 'Engineering', 'Humanities'.

programs.description: One or more programs/majors pursued at this institution. Each item includes a degree designation and a name.

^type$.description: The broad education type for this program.

designation.description: The degree designation or abbreviation of it, e.g. 'Bachelor of Science/B.S.', 'Master of Arts/M.A.', 'Associate of Applied Science/A.A.S'.

concentration.description: Concentration or track within the major/minor, if applicable, e.g., 'Artificial Intelligence'.

minor.description: Indicates if this program is a minor rather than a major.

gpa.description: The cumulative grade point average (GPA) for this program, e.g. '3.67/4.0'.

honors.description: Honors or distinctions associated with this program, e.g., 'Summa Cum Laude'.

startDate.description: The date on which the education at this institution was started.

endDate.description: The date on which the education at this institution was stopped. If current and ongoing, specify a blank string as the value for this key.

gpa.description: The cumulative grade point average (GPA), e.g. '3.67/4.0'.

items.description: The course id/code and name, e.g. 'H1302 - Introduction to American History'.

awards.description: Awards or honors earned for this program, e.g. 'Dean's List', 'Graduated with Honors'.

honorSocieties.description: A list of honor societies inducted into during the completion of education at this institution.

name.description: The name of the honor society, e.g. 'Phi Beta Kappa'.

chapter.description: The specific chapter of the honor society, if applicable, e.g. 'Omega'.

memberId.description: The relevant membership ID, if applicable.

inductionDate.description: The date of induction into the honor society.

extracurriculars.description: A list of relevant extracurricular activities participated in while a student at the institution, e.g. 'Bird Watching Club', 'Association of Computing Machinery'.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this education.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes, e.g. 'part-time study', 'transfer credits'.

awards.description: A list of awards and distinctions received, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

^title$.description: The title of the award, e.g. 'Nobel Peace Prize'.

awarder.description: The organization or entity that conferred the award, e.g. 'Time Magazine'.

summary.description: A short 1-2 sentence description of the award, e.g. 'Received for my work with Quantum Physics'.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this award.

certificates.description: A list of certificates awarded, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

name.description: The title of the certificate, e.g. 'Certified Kubernetes Administrator'.

date.description: The date the certificate was issued.

issuer.description: The organization or entity that awarded the certificate, e.g. 'CNCF'.

url.description: The relevant URL of the awarding organization's homepage, e.g. 'https://example.com'.

id.description: The ID number of the certificate for verification purposes, if applicable.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this certificate.

publications.description: A list of past and present publications made, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

name.description: The name of the publication, e.g. 'The World Wide Web'.

publisher.description: The name of the organization or entity that published the publication, e.g. 'IEEE, Computer Magazine'.

summary.description: A short summary of publication, e.g. 'Discussion of the World Wide Web, HTTP, HTML'.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this publication.

skills.description: A list of professional skills, including their mastery level.

name.description: The name of the skill, e.g. 'Web Development'.

level.description: The experience level of the skill, e.g. 'Novice', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced', etc.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this skill.

languages.description: A list of languages spoken and/or written.

fluency.description: The proficiency in utilizing this language according to the CEFR.

interests.description: A list of personal interests that lie outside one's professional work (i.e. hobbies).

name.description: The name of the interest, e.g. 'Philosophy'.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this interest.

references.description: A list of references/letters of recommendation received.

name.description: The person who wrote the reference, e.g. 'Timothy Cook'.

reference.description: e.g. Joe blogs was a great employee, who turned up to work at least once a week. He exceeded my expectations when it came to doing nothing.

projects.description: A list of past and present professional or personal projects done, sorted chronologically from latest to earliest.

name.description: The name of the project, e.g. 'The World Wide Web'.

^description$.description: A short summary of project in 1-3 sentences. e.g. 'Collated works of 2017'.

highlights.description: A list of the key highlights of the project. For best results, use the XYZ formula with quantifiable attributes.

items.description: e.g. Increased profits by 20% from 2011-2012 through viral advertising.

keywords.description: A list of keywords pertaining to this project.

startDate.description: The date on which work on this project was started.

endDate.description: The date on which work on this project was stopped. If current and ongoing, specify a blank string as the value for this key.

roles.description: A list of the roles taken on during the development of the project.

entity.description: The relevant company/entity affiliations, if any, e.g. 'Greenpeace', 'corporationXYZ'.
